user_query: My company is organizing a charity concert and we need to book artists who are related to the album 'The Dark Side of the Moon'. Can you suggest some? Additionally, I would like to know the population and elevation of the city where the concert will be held.

TaskList.description: Research and compile a list of artists who have connections to the album 'The Dark Side of the Moon'.
Obtain population and elevation data for the specific city where the concert will be held.
